briefs.title: Lottery Marketing Rules for BC Gaming Retailers Take Effect April 2026
briefs.summary: BC has created a new regulation setting rules for how lottery schemes can be marketed, advertised, and promoted, effective April 13, 2026. It defines key terms — including what counts as a 'direct marketing campaign' (reaching customers personally by mail, phone, text, email, or social media), an 'inducement' (a bonus or reward offered to get someone to play), and a 'gaming advertisement' — laying the groundwork for compliance requirements that gaming retailers must follow.
briefs.action_required: Review the new Lottery Scheme Marketing, Advertising and Promotion Regulation before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Lottery Scheme Marketing, Advertising and Promotion Regulation takes effect
